name: ReinforcementBase.ReinforcementGroupAttributes
summary: The ReinforcementGroupAttributes class is the base attributes class for ReinforcementGroup.

constructors.name: ReinforcementBase.ReinforcementGroupAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new default reinforcement attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: ReinforcementBase.ReinforcementGroupAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new reinforcement attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

properties.name: CustomPresentation
properties.summary: Custom presentation GUID to be applied to the object type

properties.name: HiddenLines
properties.summary: The line type of the hidden lines of the reinforcement.

properties.name: HideLinesHiddenByPart
properties.summary: Defines whether lines hidden by parts should be hidden or not.

properties.name: HideLinesHiddenByReinforcement
properties.summary: Defines whether lines hidden by reinforcements should be hidden or not.

properties.name: HookedEndSymbolType
properties.summary: Defines how the hooked ends of reinforcing bars should look like.

properties.name: ReinforcementVisibility
properties.summary: Defines which bars in the group appear in drawings.

properties.name: StraightEndSymbolType
properties.summary: Defines how the straight ends of reinforcing bars should look like.

properties.name: VisibleLines
properties.summary: The line type of the visible lines of the reinforcement.
